l7:ResourceSet.l7:Resource:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <wsp:Policy xmlns:L7p="http://www.layer7tech.com/ws/policy" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/policy"> <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required"> <!-- API Key authentication --> <L7p:LookupApiKey> <L7p:Location stringValue="HEADER"/> <L7p:KeyName stringValue="X-API-Key"/> </L7p:LookupApiKey>
<!-- IP whitelist --> <L7p:RemoteIpRange> <L7p:IpRange stringValue="10.0.0.0/8"/> <L7p:AllowRange booleanValue="true"/> </L7p:RemoteIpRange>
<!-- Throughput quota: 10000 per day --> <L7p:ThroughputQuota> <L7p:Quota intValue="10000"/> <L7p:TimeUnit stringValue="PER_DAY"/> <L7p:CounterName stringValue="product-api-daily"/> <L7p:CounterStrategy stringValue="ALWAYS"/> </L7p:ThroughputQuota>
<!-- Rate limit: 50 per second --> <L7p:RateLimit> <L7p:MaxRequestsPerSecond intValue="50"/> <L7p:CounterName stringValue="product-api-rps"/> </L7p:RateLimit>
<!-- Cache lookup --> <L7p:CacheLookup> <L7p:CacheId stringValue="product-cache"/> <L7p:MaxEntryAgeMillis intValue="300000"/> <L7p:MaxEntries intValue="5000"/> </L7p:CacheLookup>
<!-- JWT validation --> <L7p:DecodeJsonWebToken> <L7p:SourceVariable stringValue="request.http.header.Authorization"/> <L7p:TargetVariable stringValue="jwt.decoded"/> <L7p:ValidateSignature booleanValue="true"/> </L7p:DecodeJsonWebToken>
<!-- Route to catalog backend --> <L7p:HttpRoutingAssertion> <L7p:ProtectedServiceUrl stringValue="https://catalog-service.internal:8443/api/v2/products"/> <L7p:ConnectionTimeout intValue="15000"/> <L7p:Timeout intValue="30000"/> </L7p:HttpRoutingAssertion>
<!-- Store response in cache --> <L7p:CacheStorage> <L7p:CacheId stringValue="product-cache"/> <L7p:MaxEntrySizeBytes intValue="1048576"/> </L7p:CacheStorage> </wsp:All> </wsp:Policy>
